arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca jokes he may have to play HIMSELF up front amid Chelsea's growing injury problems - with Nicolas Jackson and Marc Guiu both out
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca joked he might have to play up front himself after injuries to Nicolas Jackson and Marc Guiu left Chelsea facing a striker shortage ahead of tomorrow's FA Cup trip to Brighton.

arts.ttl: Chelsea: Enzo Maresca dismisses Joao Felix reports with hint at future role
arts.sum: The £45million summer signing has already been shipped out on loan

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca warns Chelsea fans over sole January signing Mathis Amougou
arts.sum: The midfielder is not expected to play much despite limited competition for places

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca hints at shock Cole Palmer position change after Chelsea injury blows
arts.sum: Blues forwards Marc Guiu and Nicolas Jackson suffered injuries against West Ham

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace: Oliver Glasner confirms Ben Chilwell debut, reacts to Marc Guehi rejected transfer bid
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner confirms when Ben Chilwell will make his Crystal Palace debut after joining on loan from Chelsea and reacts to the club rejecting a deadline day offer for captain Marc Guehi.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca happy as Fabrizio Romano confirms swap deal - Chelsea transfer news today
arts.sum: All the latest transfer news, gossip and rumours from Chelsea as manager Enzo Maresca reflects on the transfer window and Fabrizio Romano confirms a summer swap deal. Maresca happy as Romano confirms swap deal – Chelsea transfer news today

Chelsea make the trip to the south coast on Saturday evening when they lock horns with Brighton & Hove Albion in the FA Cup fourth round. GK: Filip Jorgensen - Maresca finally dropped the error-prone Robert Sanchez on Monday evening as Chelsea beat West Ham United and Jorgensen produced an accomplished display in his place.

arts.ttl: Team News: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Chelsea injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's FA Cup clash between Brighton & Hove Albion and Chelsea.

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED: Chelsea 'very keen' on Garnacho alternative
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly remain “very keen” on signing Borussia Dortmund forward Karim Adeyemi this summer. We know Chelsea are very keen on him still, but that’s not the only club of the Big Six in the Premier League with interest.

arts.ttl: Joao Felix and Gimenez can start for Milan, Leao and Reijnders benched
arts.sum: There are reports Joao Felix, Santiago Gimenez and Riccardo Sottil will get their first starts...
